description: Claude Code hooks for legacy analysis validation. Copy to project .claude/hooks.json when using /ai1st-arch-legacy-analysis-lite.

hooks.description: BLOCK numbered file names (01-*, 02-*, etc.) - enforce {DOCTYPE}-{module}.md format
hooks.command: echo 'BLOCKED: Invalid file naming. Use {DOCTYPE}-{module}.md format (e.g., UC-claims.md, BRS-payments.md). NO numbered prefixes like 01-OVERVIEW.md' && exit 1

hooks.description: READ-ONLY policy: Block writes to source code files during legacy analysis
hooks.command: echo 'BLOCKED: READ-ONLY policy violation - Legacy analysis cannot modify source code' && exit 1

hooks.prompt: Before completing: Verify all extractions have file:line references. List any items missing code citations. Check for TBD/TODO placeholders.

hooks.description: Load validation rules at session start
hooks.prompt: Legacy Analysis Session: READ-ONLY mode active. All extractions require file:line citations. Use QC-01 to QC-05 quality checks before Gate 1, QC-06 and QC-07 post-generation. FILE NAMING: Use {DOCTYPE}-{module}.md format (UC-claims.md, BRS-payments.md). NO numbered prefixes (01-*, 02-*).
